svg.text: • 92. Reverse Linked List II — between positions m and n
• 25. Reverse Nodes in k-Group — repeated k-block reversal
• 24. Swap Nodes in Pairs — k-group with k = 2
• 61. Rotate List — find length, k-mod-length, splice
• 1721. Swapping Nodes in a Linked List
• 234. Palindrome Linked List — reverse second half, compare
• 143. Reorder List — reverse second half, merge alternating
• 2130. Maximum Twin Sum — reverse second half, walk pairs
• 445. Add Two Numbers II — reverse, add, reverse result
• 369. Plus One Linked List — reverse, increment, reverse
• Recursive variants of all of the above
Whenever "walk in reverse without doubly linked" is needed: reverse in place.
